name: 规划与推理工作流
summary: Plan mode、thinking budget、ultrathink 关键词——Claude Code 用一整套分层开关，把「想多久」这件事交回用户手里。
summary_en: Plan mode, thinking budgets, the ultrathink keyword — Claude Code exposes a whole stack of reasoning switches that hand "how long to think" back to the user.

name: 执行与工作区操作
summary: Task 工具、bash、@ 引用、单词级 diff、PDF 读取——这是 Claude Code 真正动手的那只手。
summary_en: The Task tool, bash, @-mentions, word-level diffs, PDF reading — this is the hand Claude Code actually uses to do the work.

name: 记忆与长上下文
summary: 从 CLAUDE.md 到 1M 上下文、从会话压缩到 /rewind——一段对话撑过几个小时，靠的是层层堆出来的长记忆机制。
summary_en: From CLAUDE.md to a 1M context window, from conversation compaction to /rewind — holding a session together for hours takes a whole stack of memory mechanics.

name: 自动化与无人值守
summary: 后台代理、/loop、定时触发、远程控制——当你不在键盘前时，Claude Code 也有自己的节奏。
summary_en: Background agents, /loop, scheduled triggers, remote control — when you're not at the keyboard, Claude Code still has a rhythm of its own.

name: 委派与协作
summary: 自定义 subagent、/agents、teammate、worktree 分叉——一次任务可以由一群 Claude 在各自隔离的副本里同时往前推。
summary_en: Custom subagents, /agents, teammates, worktree forks — a single task can now be pushed forward by a cohort of Claudes, each in its own isolated copy of the repo.

name: 连接器与生态扩展
summary: MCP、plugin、marketplace、skills、hooks、Agent SDK——Claude Code 与其说是一个工具，不如说是一个愿意被接入的接口。
summary_en: MCP, plugins, the marketplace, skills, hooks, the Agent SDK — Claude Code is less a tool than a surface willing to be plugged into.

name: 多模态与交互界面
summary: 图片、PDF、语音笔记、VS Code、Zed、Emacs、桌面 app、网页版——Claude Code 几乎把开发者会盯着的屏幕都走了一遍。
summary_en: Images, PDFs, voice notes, VS Code, Zed, Emacs, a desktop app, a web version — Claude Code has tried to show up on just about every screen a developer stares at.

name: 安全、权限与治理
summary: 权限规则的每一次修补背后都是一起真实事件：Nx 被挟持、通配符绕过、shell 续行越权、沙箱里的影子 bash。治理是被社区一次次推着长出来的。
summary_en: Every permission-rule patch has a real incident behind it — the Nx compromise, wildcard bypasses, shell line-continuation escapes, shadow bash inside the sandbox. Governance here is something the community keeps dragging out of the product.
